description_long: This is a single blue rose with a slender, slightly curved green stem and several green leaves attached at intervals along its length. The flower head is composed of multiple overlapping petals, forming a dense, layered bloom with a rich blue hue. The petals are arranged in a spiral pattern, creating a full and rounded appearance typical of cultivated roses. The leaves are ovate with pointed tips and smooth edges, attached alternately along the stem. The overall structure is delicate, with the flower positioned at the terminal end of the stem. This object would commonly be found in urban parks, gardens, or as part of decorative landscaping.
description: A vibrant blue rose with a curved green stem and several ovate green leaves, featuring a dense, spiraled arrangement of petals. The flower is positioned at the end of the stem, creating a striking and elegant appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved stem, a single large leaf near the base, and the blue rose bloom angled to the right.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full face of the blue rose, with three visible green leaves and the stem appearing straight.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the bloom angled left, showing the back of the flower and two leaves on the lower stem.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the symmetrical arrangement of leaves and the blue petals forming a rounded bloom at the top.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a spiral, overlapping pattern, forming a dense, whorled structure with radial symmetry typical of rose flowers.
